response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin, JVM tooling, Spring ecosystem, or enterprise IDE development, despite listing Java as a skill; their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps with no evidence of deep JVM internals, build tool integration, or IDE subsystem design as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Active open-source contributor with tooling and infrastructure projects
Proven ability to lead and teach through workshops and community engagement
concerns: No visible experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or JVM-based enterprise frameworks
No evidence of IDE development, language server protocol, or code analysis tooling work
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js) diverges sharply from JVM/Java/Kotlin focus
